preamble: A back vowel diphthong shift where the rising diphthong uo lowers and shifts to the falling diphthong au.

examples.note: Development of back mid-high diphthongs into low back diphthongs.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
